title: Homepage | Institutes Social Sciences
content:
Institute of Graduate Studies

Dear Students,

Doğuş University Institute of Graduate Studies aims to educate the scientists and professionals with the necessary skills by expanding the educational services offered by our university to the society through master's and doctoral programs.

It aims to educate academicians and professionals with scientific and analytical thinking, dynamic, open to innovation, equipped with the knowledge required by academia and business world, to increase the potential of our country with universal competitiveness
    in the fields of science and social sciences and to develop interdisciplinary research.

In our institute, master's and doctoral programs are equipped with a flexible, dynamic and distinguished academic staff with a multi-disciplinary perspective. With programs that we carry on still, will proceed with sure step in their academic career ladder
    We grow and professionals to work in Turkey and one of the leading institutions in the world. We are planning to enrich the educational opportunities in our institute with our new programs that we intend to open soon.

We invite our graduate students who wish to serve the society and the world of science, to gain a professional perspective in business life and to develop themselves.

Best Regards,

Director of Institute of Graduate Studies
